items.title: Sacramento Kings salary cap situation with Zach LaVine picking up his $49 million player option.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Sacramento Kings salary cap situation with Zach LaVine picking up his $49 million player option.

Along with waiving and stretching DeMar DeRozan, I'm keeping an eye on LaVine as a buyout candidate to also help get the Kings under the luxury tax line.
